changeSet.author: game-service
changeSet.comment: Partial index for the reconnect sweep's due-GRACE_PERIOD query: the table accumulates RECONNECTED/ABANDONED rows for every past disconnect, while the sweep polls every second and only ever cares about the few active grace periods.
changeSet.sql: CREATE INDEX idx_player_reconnect_saga_grace_due ON player_reconnect_saga_state (grace_expires_at) WHERE status = 'GRACE_PERIOD'
